summary: LOTTOLAB Production Ready Testing - Iteration 14 Complete. All critical features verified: 220 lotteries visible to agent, ResizeObserver error suppressed (dropdowns work without errors), 5-minute void window configured, PWA manifest loads correctly, company suspension check on login. 22 backend tests passed + 2 skipped, 13 new frontend tests passed, 16 legacy frontend tests passed.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing credentials
context_for_next_testing_agent: All production-ready features verified. ResizeObserver error fix confirmed working in index.js. PWA manifest at /manifest.json loads correctly. 3 production companies exist: LotoPam Center, BJ LOTO, LOTO PAM. Agent sees all 220 lotteries from device/config endpoint. 5-minute void window properly configured.

resize_observer_error_fix.error_suppression: PASS - Error handler in index.js successfully suppresses ResizeObserver loop errors
